  • Method Details

    • getKindIds

      public Map<Integer,String> getKindIds()

    • getOperatorRelationship

      public OperatorRelationship getOperatorRelationship(int leftKind, int rightKind)
      Computes operator relationship between given operator kinds.

      Given kinds MUST be checked to be operators before calling this method.

      Parameters:
      leftKind - the kind of the left operator
      rightKind - the kind of the right operator
      Returns:
      an operator relationship
